text.title: BA Strategic Partnership Core Rules
text.summary: 4 testable rules every application of BA Strategic Partnership enforces.

rule.statement: Plan declares ≥1 sponsor OKR the BA co-owns by name. Generic 'support OKRs' is rejected.

rationale.source: OKR practice / Doerr, Measure What Matters (2018)

rule.statement: BA owns authorship of ≥1 business-case during the period; co-authored cases name BA as primary author.
rule.rationale: Reviewer-only stance keeps BA in documentation slot.

rule.statement: Quarterly sponsor sync calendar-booked at start of period; meeting minutes committed.
rule.rationale: Cadence without booking drifts to never.

rule.statement: Strategic artefacts (OKR mapping, business case, sponsor-decision log) carry version_tag + last_reviewed.
